_comment: OpenAI / Anthropic function-calling (tool) schemas for the AceChange agent wallet. Wire each tool to AgentWallet.pay()/swap() (TS or Python). Non-custodial: the wallet signs locally.

function.name: pay_crypto
function.description: Pay an amount of a token to any Base address. Non-custodial: the agent wallet signs and broadcasts; AceChange enforces the session caps you set. Returns the transaction hash.

est_usd.description: Approx USD value, for cap enforcement

function.name: swap_crypto
function.description: Swap one token for another on Base (0x gasless, no minimum, non-custodial). The agent wallet signs the 0x payload locally; AceChange relays it.
